signal.description: Derive and execute the next VISION-aligned tusq.dev increment after M25. Prioritize redaction and retention defaults for data/schema governance: a bounded repo-local policy/defaults mechanism that can populate redaction.log_level, redaction.mask_in_traces, and redaction.retention_days without runtime execution, network I/O, or compliance overclaiming.
